name: Alex
role: Security tester trying to break the app
description: Sends malicious input, tries to access things that should be restricted
behaviors: Send messages containing only whitespace, null bytes, or unicode control characters
Try to manipulate localStorage via the browser console
Send API requests with missing or malformed fields
Try to access /api/game/message without starting a session first
Inject HTML tags into every text input
Try to start multiple sims simultaneously
evaluation_questions: Is any user input rendered as HTML (not textContent)?
Does the API return helpful error messages without leaking internals?
Can I corrupt the session state?
What happens when I send requests out of order?
Are there any unhandled promise rejections in the console?
